3004360.name: Patient Seven
3004360.description:
Revive seven sickly creatures in a short adventure through a surreal, vibrant world.

FEATURES

  • Solve puzzles and make game-defining choices in 7 rooms uniquely themed to each creature
  • Explore a colorful 2D world full of secrets to uncover
  • Dance at the click of a button and discover how the world responds to you
  • Multiple endings based on the choices you make
  • Vivid, hand-drawn art and animation created by the artist Church
  • An original, dynamic soundtrack by Mark Benis
3004360.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
